headlines.description: Matheus Cunha cancelled out Brenden Aaronson's strike as Ruben Amorim's Manchester United and rivals Leeds fought out a tense 1-1 draw at rocking Elland Road.
headlines.shortLinkText: Matheus Cunha equaliser earns Man Utd a draw at Leeds

headlines.description: Igor Thiago ended a six-match drought with a first Premier League hat trick in the 4-2 victory at Everton which fired Brentford to within four points of the top four.
headlines.shortLinkText: Thiago hat trick downs Everton, Brentford go 7th

headlines.description: Bruno Guimarães was Newcastle's hero as they edged past Crystal Palace to claim a second successive Premier League victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bruno Guimarães scores again as Newcastle edge Crystal Palace

headlines.description: Tottenham started 2026 by dropping more points at home and were booed off after Sunderland struck in the 80th minute through Brian Brobbey to rescue a 1-1 draw.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs booed off again as Sunderland snatch draw

headlines.description: Liverpool's hopes of finishing in the Premier League's top four received a damaging blow as Fulham's Harrison Reed struck one of the goals of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Harrison Reed stunner leaves Liverpool reeling as Fulham force chaotic draw

headlines.description: Enzo Fernández scored a stoppage-time equalizer as managerless Chelsea snatched a 1-1 draw at title-chasing Manchester City.
headlines.shortLinkText: Managerless Chelsea hold Man City to late draw with Enzo Fernández equalizer
